caption: A man wearing a tall, spiked gray wig, glasses, and headphones sits in a podcast studio, speaking into a microphone. He is dressed in a white button-down shirt with a red bow tie and tan suspenders. Behind him is a wall covered in framed photographs and a mannequin torso wearing a white top. To his right, a black bag and some yellow branded materials are visible. In the foreground, a microphone is positioned in front of him, featuring a logo that reads "THE TALK PODCAST." On the right side of the screen, a red and white graphic reads "GOSS TALK JOY." As the scene progresses, the man continues to speak, with slight shifts in his facial expressions and mouth movements while remaining in the same seated position.
